howItWorks.intro: This barometric pressure trend calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: 29.92 inHg (1013.25 mb) is standard sea-level pressure.

faq.q: What pressure change indicates a storm?
faq.a: A drop of 0.06+ inHg in 3 hours often signals approaching severe weather.
